reasoning: Strong overall: flags numerous genuine author-prose bias instances, avoids quoted text, and applies mostly appropriate labels. Some clear biased phrases in the author’s prose were missed.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items come from the author’s own prose/headline; no quotes or attributed statements were flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged phrases are defensibly subjective/spin-filled or evaluative author framing; none are neutral or misattributed.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear author-level bias phrases such as ‘staggering new peak,’ ‘impossible slashing,’ ‘always-aspirational,’ ‘menacing feedback,’ ‘gavage of CO2,’ ‘truly unthinkable,’ ‘starchy World Bank,’ and ‘frankly in denial.’
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are largely apt (Sensationalism, Spin, OPPF, Word Choice). A couple are debatable (e.g., treating hedged projections as OPPF rather than Word Choice/Spin), but generally sound.
